sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! Green 3 moved from (45-50, 30-35) to (45-50, 39-44) after 3 RIGHT actions (3 cols/action). Then it moved from (45-50, 39-44) to (45-50, 30-35) after 3 LEFT actions (3 cols/action).
So LEFT DOES work from rows 45-50! Earlier I thought LEFT didn't work from this row, but it does work when the green is not overlapping with the purple strip.
So the key insight is:
- LEFT works when the green is completely to the right of the purple strip (cols > 34)
- LEFT stops when the green reaches cols 30-35, which overlaps with the purple strip
- LEFT doesn't work when the green is already at cols 30-35 (overlapping the purple strip)
So to move Green 3 to the left side (cols 6-11), I need to:
1. Move Green 3 RIGHT to get it completely to the right of the purple strip
2. Move Green 3 DOWN to the bottom
3. Move Green 3 LEFT to cross the purple strip
But wait, earlier when Green 3 was at the bottom and moved LEFT, it stopped at cols 30-35. So even from the bottom, it can't cross the purple strip.
Hmm, but now I know that LEFT works from rows 45-50 when the green is to the right of the purple strip. So maybe I can:
1. Move Green 3 RIGHT to get it to cols > 34
2. Move Green 3 UP to get it above the purple horizontal strip (rows 27-29)
3. Move Green 3 LEFT to cross the purple vertical strip from above
4. Move Green 3 DOWN to the target position
But the purple vertical strip is at rows 0-62, so it extends all the way to the top. So moving UP won't help cross the purple vertical strip.
Wait, let me reconsider. The purple vertical strip is at cols 32-34, rows 0-62. The purple horizontal strip is at rows 27-29, cols 0-63. So the purple cross divides the board into 4 quadrants:
- Top-left: rows 0-26, cols 0-31
- Top-right: rows 0-26, cols 35-63
- Bottom-left: rows 30-62, cols 0-31
- Bottom-right: rows 30-62, cols 35-63
Green 3 is in the bottom-right quadrant (rows 45-50, cols 39-44 after moving RIGHT). Dark outline 3 is in the bottom-left quadrant (rows 41-48, cols 5-12).
To get Green 3 from the bottom-right quadrant to the bottom-left quadrant, it needs to cross the purple vertical strip at cols 32-34. But Green 3 can't cross the purple strip by moving LEFT, because it stops at cols 30-35.
Maybe I need to move Green 3 UP, above the purple horizontal strip, then LEFT, then DOWN. But the purple vertical strip extends all the way to the top, so that won't help.
Wait, actually, let me look at the board more carefully. The purple vertical strip is at cols 32-34. But is it really a solid strip from rows 0-62? Or is there a gap somewhere?
Looking at the image, the purple vertical strip appears to be at cols 32-34, from the top to the bottom. The purple horizontal strip is at rows 27-29, from the left to the right. So the purple cross is a solid cross, dividing the board into 4 quadrants.
But wait, looking at the image more carefully, the purple vertical strip seems to end at the bottom of the top-right quadrant. Let me check the segmentation to see the exact bounds of the purple objects.
Actually, I think the issue is that Green 3 can't cross the purple vertical strip because it's blocked. But maybe there's a gap in the purple strip that I'm missing.
Let me check the segmentation to see the exact layout of the purple objects.
